title: EnvironmentVarianceRecord
description: Records variance of computed quantities across environment tiers (M50). Written as environment_variance.json by build-phase5-sidecars (P6-M3).

quantityId.description: Quantity ID whose variance is measured.

environmentTierId.description: Environment tier ID where the variance was measured.

relativeStdDev.description: Relative standard deviation of the quantity across this environment tier (stddev / |mean|). Triggers EnvironmentInstability when > threshold.

flagged.description: Whether this variance was flagged as excessive by upstream analysis.

provenance.description: Provenance of the backend that produced this record.
